name: clinical-research-assistant
description: Interactive clinical research assistant plugin for Claude Code and Cowork. Built for general surgery residents — guides through deep literature review, rigorous statistical analysis, figure generation, and full manuscript writing with step-by-step approval. Includes six commands: /literature-review (PubMed/bioRxiv/Scholar Gateway search + gap analysis + novelty assessment), /analyze (statistical analysis with Excel output), /visualize (publication-quality figures), /write-introduction (Introduction section in chat), /write-methods-results (Methods & Results sections in chat), /write-discussion (Discussion & Conclusion in chat). All writing outputs are delivered directly in chat.
